sentences.english: We're evaluating your platform for our company of about three hundred employees.
sentences.korean: 약 300명 규모 회사를 위해 귀사 플랫폼을 평가하고 있습니다.

sentences.english: Our enterprise plan starts at twenty-five dollars per user per month.
We were hoping for something closer to eighteen per user.
If you commit to a two-year contract I can offer twenty per user.
sentences.korean: 2년 계약에 약정하시면 사용자당 20달러를 제안할 수 있습니다.

sentences.english: Can you include onboarding and training at no additional cost?
sentences.korean: 온보딩과 교육을 추가 비용 없이 포함할 수 있나요?

sentences.english: I can include basic onboarding but dedicated training workshops would be an additional five thousand.
sentences.korean: 기본 온보딩은 포함할 수 있지만 전용 교육 워크숍은 추가 5천 달러입니다.

sentences.english: Let me take this back to my team and we'll get back to you by Friday.
